sn56.62:1.1: Then the Blessed One took up a little bit of soil in his fingernail and addressed the bhikkhus thus. …
sn56.62:2.1: "So too, bhikkhus, those beings are few who are reborn in the middle countries. But those beings are more numerous who are reborn in the outlying countries among the uncultured barbarians. … " sn.v.467
